The smartphone displays a YouTube channel named 'Kitchen with Rehana'.
The channel has 51 subscribers.
A red 'SUBSCRIBE' button is visible on the phone screen.
A red 'SUBSCRIBE' graphic is overlaid in the bottom left corner of the video frame.
